query: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, COUNT(q.id) as quotationCount FROM clients c LEFT JOIN quotations q ON c.id = q.clientId WHERE c.name LIKE '%Lina%' OR c.name LIKE '%Paez%' GROUP BY c.id
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT c.id, c.name, c.email, COUNT(q.id) as quotationCount FROM clients c LEFT JOIN quotations q ON c.id = q.clientId WHERE c.name LIKE '%Lina%' OR c.name LIKE '%Paez%' GROUP BY c.id
